message:
fix(fwc): resolve 5 clippy warnings in intent, supply_chain_cmd, and main [24llg.7.3]

- Allow dead_code on IntentCompilerConfig::host_url (future use)
- Change build_attestation to take Option<&String> instead of &Option<String>
- Replace |_| with |()| for unit pattern matching (3 sites)
- Remove needless as_deref() on Option<&String>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
